name: danzer_K
description: Danzer ABCK tile K. Tetrahedron with one half-integer vertex (vertex 4, class IV). scale_denom=2 required: natural coordinates are (0,0,0), (-1,tau,0), (tau,tau,tau), (1/2)(-1, 1/tau, tau); multiply by 2 to get integer ZPhi numerators. Source: Frettloh (Bielefeld internal report), Table 1. Frettloh notes explicitly: 'K has a vertex (number 4) whose coordinates are half integers with respect to MF.' Vertex classes I, II, III, IV.
